acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing the Abdaty Technologie website and using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms in their entirety, you must not access this website or use our services. Access to this website and use of our services are subject to these Terms and our Privacy Policy.

services.title: 2. Our Services
services.content: Abdaty Technologie provides a comprehensive range of technology services including, but not limited to, web and mobile application development, desktop software development, UI/UX design, network infrastructure, cybersecurity, and data analytics and artificial intelligence. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any service at any time without prior notice for any reason, including but not limited to maintenance, updates, or technical improvements.

userAccount.title: 3. User Account
userAccount.content: To access certain of our services, you must create a user account. You declare and warrant that all information you provide during registration is accurate, complete, and current. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

points.accuracy: Maintain the accuracy and completeness of your personal information
points.security: Secure your password and account against any unauthorized access
points.responsibility: Assume full responsibility for all activities performed under your account

payment.title: 4. Payment Terms
payment.content: Payments for our services are made in accordance with the rates displayed on our website at the time of ordering. We accept various payment methods including credit cards, bank transfers, and other secure electronic payment methods. All payments are non-refundable unless expressly stated otherwise in our specific Terms of Sale or in case of non-performance of our contractual obligations.

cancellation.title: 5. Cancellation and Refund
cancellation.content: You may cancel your subscription at any time by logging into your account and following the cancellation procedure. Cancellation will take effect at the end of the current billing period. No partial or prorated refund will be provided for the current period. In case of early termination of a service contract, refund terms will be defined in the specific contract.

limitation.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Abdaty Technologie shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services. This limitation applies to damages for loss of profits, data loss, business interruption, or any other pecuniary loss, even if Abdaty Technologie has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

intellectual.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content, trademarks, logos, graphics, software, databases, and copyrights on this website are the exclusive property of Abdaty Technologie or its licensors and are protected by national and international intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, adapt, publish, transmit, create derivative works, or use this content, in whole or in part, without our prior written consent.

privacy.title: 8. Privacy Policy
privacy.content: Your privacy is of paramount importance to us. We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with our

modifications.title: 9. Modification of Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time at our sole discretion. All modifications will become effective immediately upon posting on this website. Your continued use of our services after posting of modifications constitutes your acceptance of the new terms. It is your responsibility to review these Terms regularly to stay informed of any changes.

contact.title: 10. Contact and Support
contact.content: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, or to report a potential violation, please contact us through our

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Abdaty Technologie is firmly committed to protecting the privacy and data confidentiality of its users. This Privacy Policy aims to inform you transparently about the nature, purposes, and methods of collection, processing, and protection of your personal data.

information.title: 1. Data Collected
information.content: We collect the following categories of personal data when you use our services:

points.personal: Identification data: first name, last name, email address, phone number
points.contact: Professional contact details: company, position, business address
points.usage: Usage data: browsing history, preferences, interactions with our services
points.payment: Payment data: secure banking information (processed in compliance with PCI-DSS standards)

collection.title: 2. Collection Methods
collection.content: Data is collected directly from you when you create an account, subscribe to our services, communicate with our customer service team, or participate in our promotional programs. We may also automatically collect certain technical data during your use of our website and applications.

usage.title: 3. Data Usage
usage.content: Your personal data is used exclusively for the following purposes:

points.service: Provision, personalization, and improvement of our technology services
points.communication: Communication with you regarding your account, orders, and our offerings
points.security: Securing your account and preventing fraudulent activities
points.analytics: Analysis of usage trends to optimize our services and develop new features

sharing.title: 4. Data Sharing
sharing.content: Abdaty Technologie does not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except in the following cases: (i) with your explicit consent, (ii) to comply with legal or regulatory obligations, (iii) to protect our rights or property, or (iv) with our duly authorized subcontractors strictly for the provision of services.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement state-of-the-art technical and organizational security measures in accordance with industry best practices to protect your data against any unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include data encryption, two-factor authentication, and regular security audits.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your user experience, analyze service usage, and personalize content. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, although this may affect certain functionalities of our website.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable national legislation, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:

points.access: Right of access: obtain confirmation of processing and a copy of your data
points.correction: Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
points.deletion: Right to erasure: request deletion of your data (right to be forgotten)
points.objection: Right to object: object to processing of your data for legitimate reasons

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to achieve the purposes for which it was collected, in compliance with applicable legal and regulatory requirements. Upon expiration of this period, data is either deleted or anonymized.

gdpr.title: 9. GDPR Compliance
gdpr.content: Abdaty Technologie is fully compliant with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 on the protection of natural persons with regard to the processing of personal data (GDPR). We have appointed a Data Protection Officer (DPO) and maintain processing records in accordance with regulatory requirements.

contact.title: 10. Contact and Exercise of Rights
contact.content: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, or to exercise your rights over your personal data, please contact us through our

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find answers to your questions quickly

what.question: What is Abdaty Tech?
what.answer: Abdaty Tech is a software development company based in Mali, specializing in web, mobile, and desktop applications, as well as UI/UX design, network infrastructure, and cybersecurity.

where.question: Where are you located?
where.answer: Our headquarters is located in Bamako, Mali. We serve clients locally and internationally.

how.question: How can I start a project?
how.answer: Contact us via our contact form, email, or phone. We'll arrange a free consultation to discuss your needs.

who.question: Who are your clients?
who.answer: We work with startups, SMEs, and large enterprises across various sectors: finance, healthcare, education, e-commerce, etc.

types.question: What types of services do you offer?
types.answer: We offer web, mobile, and desktop development, UI/UX design, network infrastructure, cybersecurity, data analysis and AI, as well as an SMS API.

custom.question: Do you do custom development?
custom.answer: Yes, all our projects are customized to your specific needs. We don't offer off-the-shelf solutions.

timeline.question: What is the delivery timeline?
timeline.answer: It depends on project complexity. A simple website takes 2-4 weeks, a complex application can take 3-6 months. We establish a detailed schedule during the discovery phase.

support.question: Do you offer post-delivery support?
support.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing technical support, updates, and maintenance for all our projects.

cost.question: How much do your services cost?
cost.answer: Our rates vary depending on project complexity and scope. Contact us for a free personalized quote.

payment.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.answer: We accept bank transfers, Orange Money, Moov Money, and international credit cards.

refund.question: What is your refund policy?
refund.answer: We work in stages with validation at each phase. If you're not satisfied, we revise the work until you're completely satisfied.

discount.question: Do you offer discounts?
discount.answer: Yes, we offer discounts for long-term projects, startups, and non-profit organizations.

technologies.question: What technologies do you use?
technologies.answer: We use modern technologies: React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Java, PHP, Flutter, React Native, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, etc.

security.question: How do you ensure security?
security.answer: We follow security best practices: data encryption, secure authentication, penetration testing, GDPR compliance, etc.

hosting.question: Do you manage hosting?
hosting.answer: Yes, we can manage hosting on AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, or any other provider of your choice.

maintenance.question: What does maintenance include?
maintenance.answer: Maintenance includes security updates, bug fixes, regular backups, performance monitoring, and technical support.

contact.title: Didn't find your answer?
contact.subtitle: Contact us directly, we'll be happy to help

chatbot.title: Abdaty Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I'm Abdaty Tech's virtual assistant. How can I help you today?

responses.greeting: Hello! Welcome to Abdaty Tech. How can I help you today?
responses.services: We offer a full range of services: web (websites, web applications), mobile (iOS, Android) development, UI/UX design, network infrastructure, cybersecurity, data analysis and AI, as well as an SMS API. We are based in Mali and serve all of Africa. Which service interests you?
responses.pricing: Our rates vary depending on project complexity and the service chosen. For a free personalized quote, contact us at contact@abdatytch.com or visit our contact page. For SMS API, our plans start at 20 FCFA per message.
responses.contact: You can contact us by email at contact@abdatytch.com, by phone at +223 76 71 41 42, or via our contact form on the website. We generally respond within 24h.
responses.sms: Our SMS API allows you to send messages in Mali with delivery in less than 3 seconds. We offer 3 plans: Starter (20 FCFA/SMS), Business (18 FCFA/SMS) and Enterprise (15 FCFA/SMS). The API is easy to integrate with complete documentation. Visit /en/sms-api for more info.
responses.about: Abdaty Technologie is a technology development company based in Mali. We specialize in web, mobile development, UI/UX design, cybersecurity and AI. Our mission is to transform African businesses through innovative technological solutions. We have over 10 years of experience.
responses.web: Our web development service includes creating showcase websites, e-commerce, custom web applications, and CMS. We use modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, etc. Our sites are SEO optimized, responsive and performant.
responses.mobile: We develop native (iOS and Android) and hybrid (React Native, Flutter) mobile applications. Our apps are performant, secure and offer excellent user experience. We manage the complete development from design to deployment on stores.
responses.security: Our cybersecurity services include: security audits, penetration testing, DDoS protection, data encryption, GDPR compliance, and security training. We protect your systems and data against cyber threats.
responses.technologies: We use the most modern technologies: React, Next.js, Vue.js, Node.js, Python, React Native, Flutter, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and many more. We choose technologies adapted to each project.
responses.portfolio: We have completed over 500 projects for clients in Mali and across Africa. Our clients include startups, SMEs, large enterprises and government organizations. You can see some of our projects on our website.
responses.location: We are based in Mali, but we serve clients across Africa and beyond. Our team is capable of working remotely on international projects.
responses.timeline: Development timeline depends on project complexity. A simple showcase site can take 2-4 weeks, a complex web application 2-3 months, and a mobile app 3-6 months. Contact us for a precise estimate.
responses.support: We offer technical support after delivery. Our maintenance plans include bug fixes, security updates, continuous improvement, and email/phone support.
responses.default: I'm not sure I understand. Can you rephrase your question? You can also choose a quick question below or contact our team directly for personalized assistance.
